---
title: "cancel_all_orders"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `cancel_all_orders()`

Cancel All Orders

## Usage

```r
cancel_all_orders(
  ticker = NULL,
  event_ticker = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. Cancel only orders for this market ticker. Optional. |
| `event_ticker` | Character. Cancel only orders for this event. Optional. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with cancelled orders.

## Description

Cancels all resting orders, optionally filtered by market or event.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Cancel all resting orders
cancel_all_orders()

# Cancel orders for specific market
cancel_all_orders(ticker = "KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other trading: 
`amend_order()`,
`batch_cancel_orders()`,
`batch_create_orders()`,
`cancel_order()`,
`create_order()`,
`decrease_order()`,
`get_order()`
